meta.title: Can Miró: Villa with private pool in La Lluca, Jávea
meta.description: A sun-filled 4-bedroom villa with a private pool in La Lluca, Jávea. Sea-facing terraces, two kitchens and four outdoor lounges on Spain's Costa Blanca.

hero.title: Can Miró
hero.subtitle: A light-filled villa with a private pool, a short drive from Jávea's beaches and old town.

intro.title: Your unhurried place in the Mediterranean sun
intro.body: Tucked into the green hillside of La Lluca, Can Miró is a spacious family villa built for slow mornings and long, warm evenings. Wake to birdsong, swim before breakfast, and drift between four outdoor lounges as the light moves across the day. The beaches of the Arenal and the cobbled old town of Jávea are both a short drive away.

gallery.title: A first look
gallery.subtitle: Every corner made for easy Mediterranean living.

amenities.title: Room to spread out, inside and out
amenities.subtitle: Four bedrooms, three bathrooms and two kitchens across a home designed around the outdoors.

area.title: Jávea, at your doorstep
area.subtitle: One of the Costa Blanca's most loved corners: turquoise coves, a working fishing port, and a golden-stone old town full of restaurants and markets.
do: Swim in the crystal coves of Cap de Sant Antoni and the Portitxol islet
Wander the Thursday market and dine in the old town's plazas
Sunset drinks at the port with fresh Mediterranean seafood
Coastal walks, cycling and the Montgó natural park on the doorstep

rates.title: Seasons & pricing
rates.subtitle: Indicative weekly rates. Get in touch for exact dates, shorter stays and long-stay offers.
included: Final cleaning & fresh linens and towels
rates.note: Rates are placeholders. Confirm current pricing on enquiry. A refundable damage deposit applies.

items.r1: The photos don't do it justice. The pool and terraces were the heart of our week, we barely wanted to leave. Spotless, calm and beautifully kept.
items.r2: Perfect for our family of six. Two kitchens made everything easy, the kids lived at the table-tennis table, and the beach was a five-minute drive. We're already rebooking.
items.r3: A truly relaxing week. Comfortable, quiet, and every outdoor corner catches the sun at a different time of day. Wonderful hosts, too.

checkin.q: What are the check-in and check-out times?
checkin.a: Check-in is from 4:00 pm and check-out is by 10:00 am. Flexible timing is often possible depending on the changeover, just ask.

deposit.a: Yes, a refundable damage deposit is held before arrival and returned within a few days of check-out, subject to a normal inspection.

cancellation.a: We offer a fair, clearly stated cancellation policy that we'll confirm with your booking. Contact us for the current terms for your dates.

pets.a: We're sorry, but pets are not permitted at the villa.

pool.q: Is the pool private and heated?
pool.a: Yes. The pool is private, for your group's exclusive use, and heated, so it's comfortable to swim in well beyond the summer months.

kids.q: Is the villa suitable for children?
kids.a: Very much so. There's plenty of space, a table-tennis table and safe garden areas, and we keep a selection of pool toys for younger guests. Just tell us their ages and we'll be glad to advise.

cleaning.a: A final clean and fresh linens and towels are included. Mid-stay cleaning and extra services can be arranged.

parking.a: Yes, there is private parking at the villa. A car is recommended to make the most of the area.

enquiry.title: Check dates & get in touch
enquiry.subtitle: Tell us your dates and we'll come back to you personally, usually within a day. Prefer to chat? Message us on WhatsApp.

fields.name: Your name
fields.messagePlaceholder: Tell us a little about your trip…

enquiry.success: Thank you! Your enquiry is on its way. We'll be in touch very soon.
enquiry.error: Something went wrong. Please try again, or reach us on WhatsApp or by email.

footer.tagline: A private villa in La Lluca, Jávea, Costa Blanca, Spain.

whatsapp.prefill: Hello! I'm interested in staying at Can Miró.

booking.title: Check dates & book
booking.subtitle: Live availability and nightly prices. Pick your arrival and departure, then send an enquiry to confirm.
booking.note: Availability is indicative and will be confirmed on enquiry. We keep the calendar in sync with our other booking channels.
